data.title: Applied Materials Raises Quarterly Cash Dividend by 15 Percent
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, Applied Materials, Inc. revealed a notable development on March 13, 2026. The company's Board of Directors sanctioned a significant 15% boost in the quarterly cash dividend, escalating from $0.46 to $0.53 per share. This increase is set to be disbursed on June 11, 2026, to shareholders documented as of May 21, 2026. This decision marks a streak of nine successive years witnessing dividend increments for the company.

data.title: Dragonfly Energy to Report Preliminary Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial and Operational Results on March 16, 2026
data.description: The Nevada-based Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp. (Nasdaq: DFLI) disclosed its plan to unveil the preliminary financial and operational data for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025, post-market closure on Monday, March 16, 2026. Following this release, a conference call is scheduled for March 16, 2026, at 4:30 PM Eastern Time. Dragonfly Energy is recognized for its expertise in energy storage and battery technology.

data.description: On March 13, 2026, Safehold Inc. (NYSE: SAFE) reported that its Board of Directors approved common stock dividends totaling $0.177 per share for Q1 of 2026. This amount equates to an annual rate of $0.708 per share. The dividends are scheduled for payment in...

data.title: Kevin Warsh could face challenges as Fed Chair with Iran conflict amid desire for rapid interest rate cuts; confirmation difficulty looms.
data.description: The nominee chosen by President Trump to head the Federal Reserve might encounter difficulties in being confirmed if he pushes for immediate interest rate reductions. The ongoing conflict in Iran adds to the challenges ahead.

data.title: Solar A/S: No. 5 2026 Course of annual general meeting
data.description: During the annual general meeting (AGM), the management's review was acknowledged, and the Annual Report 2025 was discussed and approved by the attendees. The statement given by the Executive Board and the Board of Directors, along with the independent auditors' report, was also reviewed. This important gathering highlighted key financial figures and decisions, affirming the company's direction for the upcoming year.

data.title: Lotus Tech Becomes the Second Automaker to Obtain UN R171 Certification Globally, Advancing ADAS Compliance
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Lotus Technology Inc., a prominent intelligent and luxury mobility provider, disclosed its certification under UN Regulation No. 171, 01 Series (UN R171.01) from the United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE). Trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LOT, the company is now the second automaker worldwide to receive this certification, solidifying its status in the industry.

data.title: Kratos, Airbus Preparing Two Valkyries for First Flight with European Mission System
data.description: A collaborative team is making steady advancements in developing an Integrated Uncrewed Collaborative Combat Aircraft (UCCA) system for the German Air Force. The joint effort is focused on creating a sophisticated unmanned aircraft that can operate in a collaborative combat environment. The team is working towards completing the system, which is set to provide the German Air Force with a cutting-edge capability. This development is a part of ongoing efforts to enhance the Air Force's technological capabilities and strengthen national defense. The project marks a significant milestone in the military's pursuit of innovative unmanned aircraft solutions.

data.title: XORTX Reports that Independent Proxy Advisory Firms Recommend XORTX Shareholders Vote “For” the Share Consolidation
data.description: XORTX Therapeutics Inc., a pharmaceutical company specializing in treatments for gout and progressive kidney disease, received positive recommendations from independent proxy advisory firms, such as Institutional Shareholder Services, to vote in favor of the share consolidation at their upcoming shareholder meeting on March 24, 2026. XORTX is listed on NASDAQ as XRTX, TSXV as XRTX, and Frankfurt as ANU. The meeting is crucial for shareholders as they consider the company's proposed restructuring plan.
